Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPROPRIEDADES', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PrpSts = nullvalue(&PrpSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Propriedades' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount PrpSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = Propriedades.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, PrpCod, &IsClientePropriedade, &PesCod) &Update = !'' &Update.Link = Propriedades.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, PrpCod, &IsClientePropriedade, &PesCod) &GridPrpEndCidNom = Trim(PrpEndCidNom)+'-'+PrpEndCidUfeCod Do Case Case PrpSts = Status_Propriedade.Ativa PrpSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case PrpSts = Status_Propriedade.Inativa PrpSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case PrpSts = Status_Propriedade.Extinta PrpSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case PrpSts = Status_Propriedade.OutrasAreas PrpSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfoLight WWColumnTagInfoLightSingleCell' Otherwise PrpSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Propriedades.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(PrpCod), &IsClientePropriedade, &PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PrpNom1.Visible = False &PrpEnd1.Visible = False &PrpEndCep1.Visible = False &PrpEndCidNom1.Visible = False &PrpIns1.Visible = False &PrpAtvPri1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPNOM' &PrpNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPEND' &PrpEnd1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPENDCEP' &PrpEndCep1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPENDCIDNOM' &PrpEndCidNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPINS' &PrpIns1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPATVPRI' &PrpAtvPri1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PrpNom2.Visible = False &PrpEnd2.Visible = False &PrpEndCep2.Visible = False &PrpEndCidNom2.Visible = False &PrpIns2.Visible = False &PrpAtvPri2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPNOM' &PrpNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPEND' &PrpEnd2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPENDCEP' &PrpEndCep2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPENDCIDNOM' &PrpEndCidNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPINS' &PrpIns2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPATVPRI' &PrpAtvPri2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PrpNom3.Visible = False &PrpEnd3.Visible = False &PrpEndCep3.Visible = False &PrpEndCidNom3.Visible = False &PrpIns3.Visible = False &PrpAtvPri3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPNOM' &PrpNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPEND' &PrpEnd3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPENDCEP' &PrpEndCep3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPENDCIDNOM' &PrpEndCidNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPINS' &PrpIns3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPATVPRI' &PrpAtvPri3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPNOM' &PrpNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPNOM' &PrpNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRPCOD" &PrpCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRPSTS" &PrpSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPNOM' &PrpNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPEND' &PrpEnd1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPENDCEP' &PrpEndCep1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPENDCIDNOM' &PrpEndCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPINS' &PrpIns1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPATVPRI' &PrpAtvPri1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRPCOD", "", not &PrpCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PrpCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRPSTS", "", not &PrpSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PrpSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPNOM' AND not &PrpNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPEND' AND not &PrpEnd1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpEnd1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPENDCEP' AND not &PrpEndCep1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpEndCep1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPENDCIDNOM' AND not &PrpEndCidNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpEndCidNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPINS' AND not &PrpIns1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpIns1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PRPATVPRI' AND not &PrpAtvPri1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpAtvPri1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPNOM' AND not &PrpNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPEND' AND not &PrpEnd2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpEnd2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPENDCEP' AND not &PrpEndCep2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpEndCep2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPENDCIDNOM' AND not &PrpEndCidNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpEndCidNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPINS' AND not &PrpIns2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpIns2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PRPATVPRI' AND not &PrpAtvPri2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpAtvPri2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPNOM' AND not &PrpNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPEND' AND not &PrpEnd3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpEnd3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPENDCEP' AND not &PrpEndCep3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpEndCep3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPENDCIDNOM' AND not &PrpEndCidNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpEndCidNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPINS' AND not &PrpIns3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpIns3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PRPATVPRI' AND not &PrpAtvPri3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PrpAtvPri3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Propriedades" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
